note: 算法候选经 Claude 盘前按新闻/信心筛选。仅供学习/研究参考,不构成投资建议或收益承诺。市场有风险,盈亏自负。
data_quality_flags: QQQ shows -3% in quotes.json vs SPY +0.6% and NVDA +4.4% — inconsistent, likely bad prev_close; ignored (regime uses SPY). Energy (XOM +12%, OXY +10%) still gapping hard = very extended.
conviction_note: 1 name — HOLD NVDA. It held flat through Thursday's tech selloff (Tesla -14% on an earnings miss + AI-spend fears, Nasdaq -2.2%) = clear relative strength, and it's recovering premarket (+4.4%). Dropped JPM despite the rotation-into-banks angle: it's up 4 straight days with premarket +4.7% (chasing the gap) and no catalyst I can confirm; with NEW Trump tariffs taking effect today + AI jitters + elevated yields, this is not a day to add a chased name into the weekend. AMD still chased (+7.2%/3d, no-chase blocks). Energy way overextended + OXY-type names benched. Staying focused, not padding.

reasoning.en: HOLD. NVDA held flat through Thursday's -2.2% Nasdaq selloff (Tesla/AI-spend fears) — relative strength — and is +4.4% premarket. Already long from $208.75, stop $203.53. 3d +2.7% (not extended). Risk: new tariffs + AI jitters + weekend gap; managed by the tight stop and T1/trailing, so if it rolls over it's cut fast.
reasoning.zh: 继续持有。周四纳指 -2.2% 抛售(特斯拉/AI 烧钱恐慌)中 NVDA 走平 —— 相对强势 —— 盘前 +4.4% 回升。已在 $208.75 持有,止损 $203.53。三日 +2.7% 未过热。风险:新关税 + AI 情绪紧张 + 周末跳空;由紧止损和 T1/移动止盈管理,破位就快速离场。
